summary: dependentResourceDefs() returns nil; related/remixes are live endpoint commands, not parent-scoped dependent syncs.
reason: The generator inferred parent-scoped dependent sync for /design/{design_id}/relate and /remixed, keying the parent field as 'design_id' (the path-param name) rather than the parent design's actual 'id' field — so it silently no-opped with a misleading 'parent table empty' warning. Even fixed, enabling it would fetch relate AND remixed for every synced design on a routine 'sync --resources designs' (hundreds of calls, unbounded by --max-pages, half wasted on MakerWorld's empty remix graph). Removed so sync stays fast; 'designs related'/'designs remixes' remain live commands.
